PETITIONER BAY AREA LEGAL AID Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs In The Amount Of $50,120

Petitioner BayLegal's motion to attorney's fees and costs is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

(SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL RULING)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in complince with CRC 3.1312.
